creator: cnoel@cisco.com
text:
I added the readline line library to fix to the Tcl/Tk release for
 command line editing. Tcl core dumps in the readline library is a key
 from the numeric keypad is typed.

Fix: 

I got the latest version of readline library from the GNU distribution and
 installed it. The problem went away.
How-To-Repeat: 
 Have to add the readline edit to Tcl/Tk.
